meaning: n.(建筑物,铁路等的)上部构造,上层建筑
examples: We might try to clear up some of the cabins in the superstructure.
With the change of the economic foundation，the superstructure has to be transformed too.
UML 2. UML 2 is an EMF-based implementation of the UML 2.1 Superstructure specification.
One caution: when flimsy narrative superstructure begins to sag, anarchic wackiness can grow wearing.
Why not recognise the confusion caused by the current superstructure and simply abolish Europe's commissioners altogether?
